name: Extreme Monster Truck
description: Get ready for the most thrilling and action-packed offroad experience in Extreme Monster Truck! Drive powerful monster trucks across challenging terrains, conquer impossible tracks, and prove your driving skills in this high-energy racing adventure. Take control of massive trucks with incredible power and perform jaw-dropping stunts on rugged hills, muddy roads, desert tracks, and dangerous obstacles. Every level is designed to test your precision, speed, and control. Can you handle the extreme challenge?
instructions: W Arrow Up rarr Move Front S Arrow Down rarr Move Back A Arrow Left rarr Move Left D Arrow Right rarr Move Right - To click any button use mouse
